title: Update store key_packages functions for per-device storage
description:
Update save_key_package and get_key_package signatures and add get_all_key_packages and delete_device_key_package in relay/src/store.rs. Update ws.rs call site for save_key_package.

Algorithm:
1. save_key_package(&self, pub_id: &str, device_id: &str, data: &[u8]) -> Result<()>
   - Upsert on (pub_id, device_id): ON CONFLICT(pub_id, device_id) DO UPDATE SET data=excluded.data, updated_at=datetime('now')
2. get_key_package(&self, pub_id: &str, device_id: &str) -> Result<Option<Vec<u8>>>
   - SELECT data FROM key_packages WHERE pub_id=? AND device_id=?
3. get_all_key_packages(&self, pub_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Vec<u8>>>
   - SELECT data FROM key_packages WHERE pub_id=? ORDER BY updated_at DESC
   - Returns empty vec if no packages (not an error)
4. delete_device_key_package(&self, pub_id: &str, device_id: &str) -> Result<()>
   - DELETE FROM key_packages WHERE pub_id=? AND device_id=?
5. In relay/src/ws.rs PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE handler (~line 796): change
   store.save_key_package(&pub_id.0, &params.data) to
   store.save_key_package(&pub_id.0, &params.device_id, &params.data)
6. In relay/src/ws.rs GET_KEY_PACKAGE handler (~line 852): the GetKeyPackageParams only has pub_id (no device_id). Use get_all_key_packages and return the most recently updated one (first in ORDER BY updated_at DESC result). This preserves the existing single-result wire format for now.

Defensive rules:
- All queries parameterized (no string concat)
- get_all_key_packages returns empty vec not error when no packages found
- No key material in log statements
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace succeeds; all relay tests pass; cargo clippy clean
close_reason: save/get/get_all/delete_device functions updated; ws.rs call sites fixed
